riaz_clonality.csv.method: Purity-free CCF proxy. Per patient: clonal VAF peak = higher-mean component of a 2-component GMM on tumor VAF (Taf), or 90th percentile when <20 mutations. CCF_proxy=clip(VAF/peak,0,1). Clonal if CCF>=0.8. QC: Tcov>=20, 0<VAF<=1.
riaz_clonality.csv.join_key: patient_id (Pt## namespace shared with Riaz RNA run_catalog)
riaz_clonality.csv.caveat: No published FACETS purity in supplements -> proxy is purity-uncorrected; absolute CCF not comparable across patients with very different purity. Continuous mean_ccf/heterogeneity_index are the primary metrics; the CCF>=0.8 clonal call is a coarse threshold (hence high subclonal_fraction). For production, recompute with PyClone-VI + FACETS/ASCAT purity.

gide_id_crosswalk.csv.method: Deterministic (arm, patient-number) join, VALIDATED by clinical fingerprint: 75/75 patients match with 100% concordance on treatment arm, timepoint-set structure (57 PRE-only / 16 paired / 2 ON-only), and response label. ENA PD1_N<->iAtlas PD0N (mono); ENA ipiPD1_N<->iAtlas iPiN (combo).

hugo_clonality.csv.source: data/supplements/hugo2016/clean/hugo2016_S1D.csv (MAF; tumor ref/alt read counts parsed from MUTECT field) + hugo2016_S1B.csv (published Purity, Ploidy, Response)
hugo_clonality.csv.method: Purity-corrected CCF. VAF from MUTECT (ref,alt) counts (validated r=0.996 vs VarScan2 stated %). CCF=clip(VAF*2/purity,0,1) assuming diploid locus, mutation multiplicity=1. Clonal if CCF>=0.8. QC: tumor depth>=20.
hugo_clonality.csv.n_rna_and_labeled: pending Hugo RNA catalog (GSE78220 = SRA study SRP070710 / BioProject PRJNA312948, RNA-Seq Homo sapiens, 28 runs; verified via NCBI GEO->SRA elink; not yet in run_catalog)
caveats: 10 patients have purity<0.30 (low_purity_flag=True): CCF=VAF*2/purity saturates and over-calls clonal. Exclude or down-weight these.
Multiplicity fixed at 1 and locus assumed diploid; no allele-specific CNA correction (ploidy provided for reference but not used in CCF). A copy-gained clonal mutation can appear subclonal.

NOT cross-cohort comparable to riaz_clonality.csv on ABSOLUTE clonality: Riaz uses a purity-free VAF/clonal-peak proxy (median subclonal frac 0.70), Hugo uses purity-corrected CCF (0.25). Use each WITHIN cohort only; for cross-cohort clonality, recompute both with one pipeline (PyClone-VI + FACETS/ASCAT).
